query: SELECT ct.name as tag_name, ct.id as tag_id FROM contact_tags ct WHERE ct.name LIKE '%Khanh%' OR ct.name LIKE '%Huynh%' OR ct.name LIKE '%node%' OR ct.name LIKE '%observer%' OR ct.name LIKE '%tester%' LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2GX11Pnc2Gj5TH4.2b4c6ce847b1 --database EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB --execute SELECT ct.name as tag_name, ct.id as tag_id FROM contact_tags ct WHERE ct.name LIKE '%Khanh%' OR ct.name LIKE '%Huynh%' OR ct.name LIKE '%node%' OR ct.name LIKE '%observer%' OR ct.name LIKE '%tester%' LIMIT 20;
